title: vanilla philic
description:
VANILL PHILIC a vanilla plus modpack 1.21.1
combining neoforge with fabric
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/286deec1a950caec699b89233954fae54ea9be96.png)
this is a vanilla plus modpack that improves many things and adds, all to make minecraft more fun.
  
### what does it add?

-  **new generation of vanilla world** 🌍
-  **new generation of vanilla nether** 🌋
-  **new dungeons** 🏛️
-  **new animations (mobs and players)** 🚶 
-  **new bosses** ♟️
-  **new mechanics** 🌀
-  **magic** 🧙‍♂️
-  **news VFX** ✨
-  **sound ambient improved** 🪶
-  **air vehicles** 🚁
-  **new dimensions**  🌌
-  **new swords**  🗡️
